templates.name: How do I sign up/get the offer?
templates.content: Great question! When signing up for the Nekter app for the first time, you'll get the Sign-Up Offer for a free 16oz juice or smoothie once you connect your first purchase to the app. The offer will be added to your account after your first order or receipt is linked. Let me know if you have any questions, happy to help!

templates.name: How many points do I need to collect to receive a reward?
templates.content: You need to collect 75 points to receive a free Freshly-Made Ginger or Turmeric Shot, or keep saving your points to unlock a $3 16oz Juice or Superfood Smoothie at 150 points. Simply click "Redeem" to get a full list of your unlockable rewards!

templates.name: How many bottled drinks per day?
templates.content: The Classic Detox Cleanse will include 6 bottled drinks per day. For example, a 3-day cleanse will include 18 bottled drinks.

templates.name: Return policy
templates.content: You can check out our detailed return policy here:https://www.nekterjuicebar.com/pages/terms-and-conditions

templates.name: Customer support
templates.content: The best way to handle this is to email us directly at contact@nekterjuicebar.com  or give us a call at 1-800-385-1650. Our team is happy to help!

templates.name: Store locator
templates.content: You can find a store near you here: https://locations.nekterjuicebar.com/#/map

templates.name: Are there added sugars on your fruit juice?
templates.content: No, there are no additional sugars added to our products other than those found within the fruits and vegetables naturally, however, the only sweetener or sugar added to our bowls is agave, and this is optional either through the app or in-store upon request.

templates.name: Is your product organic?
templates.content: Not 100%, however, we always source the highest quality fruits and vegetables possible while still keeping prices reasonable and affordable for you. We want our juices, smoothies, and acai bowls to be accessible to anyone who desires to live a healthier lifestyle.

templates.name: How long does the juice last/expire
templates.content: Our cleanse bottles will come with labeled expiration dates however, juice can be stored in an airtight container in the fridge for 24 - 48 hours and up to 72 hours at the absolute most, however, we always suggest and recommend you take it while it's fresh.

templates.name: Are any of your products keto friendly?
templates.content: Our celery juice is keto-friendly, and delicious.

templates.name: What's the difference between the regular bowls and functional bowls?
templates.content: Our regular bowls are offered year-round and would be considered to be more on the sweeter side whereas our functional bowls are seasonal items and typically offer more nutritional factors such as protein etc.

templates.name: How does the Cleanse work?
templates.content: The Nekter cleanse gently helps you eliminate toxins and ultimately find balance. It also helps your digestive system make some rest. It comes with 2 choices - the 6-day Celery Detox and the Classic Detox. If you don't want to make large changes to your routine, then go for Celery Detox; Classic Detox, on the other hand, is designed to help you ditch sugar cravings and inspire healthier eating habits.

templates.name: Rewards program
templates.content: We have a rewards program where you can earn points to redeem on future purchases. Check it out here - https://www.nekterjuicebar.com/pages/loyalty-app

templates.name: Cancel / edit order
templates.content: I can check if that's possible. What's the order number, email address, and the change you'd like to make?

templates.name: Military / First responder / Healthcare / Teacher discount
templates.content: Thank you for your service! We don't have any specific discounts like that, but our deals will always be shared with our SMS subscribers or on our website, so keep an eye out!

templates.name: Social media

templates.name: Shipping Time
templates.content: You may schedule your pick-up or delivery time at checkout. If you choose the pick-up option, the earliest pick-up time will be clarified on your receipt.

templates.name: How to start the cleanse
templates.content:
We've added more information on our cleanses and the options that we offer here: https://nekter.attn.tv/sl/K69pzmLO

If this is your first time consuming a cleanse, we also recommend starting with one day, as everybody reacts differently. We want to ensure that this would be the best option for you and recommend speaking to your doctor. They know your health and what would be best for you!
